mnemonics: EVE stands for Every View Element
keyPoints: Element Content & Attributes: Understand how to get and set element content and attributes.
Different Types of Events: Learn about blur, change, click, focus, hover, load, resize, scroll, select, submit, unload.
How to Bind an Event to an Element: Use addEventListener or attachEvent method to bind an event to an element.
Event Delegation: Learn to delegate events to a parent element instead of individual child elements for better performance.
Event Listeners: Understand the difference between event listeners and event handlers, and how to use event listeners for event delegation.
